titles.text: クイズインパクト ハビットの大冒険

descriptions.text: A RPG-styled Board game with quiz questions. Mainly focuses on questions about retro games from the early Japanese Gaming systems such as Famicom, Megadrive, but also MSX and PC Engine.

Monsters have appeared on Game Impact Island where Habit lives!

The demon suddenly asks a quiz, and if the answer is incorrect, Habit will be trapped in the "jet black castle" that rises above the island.

Defeat the monsters in the quiz, aim for the jet-black castle, and defeat the quiz king!
